last_result: A primary-source and official-code audit mapped three order-robustness mechanisms to FME v2 without execution. order_regime_feedback_v1 is the selected direct feedback module: it stratifies paired order sensitivity by the proportion of items above one third of capacity. Class-conditioned reservation and confidence-gated prefix profiles are deferred because the current score(item, bins) API has no reliable normalized capacity or prefix history. No LLM/API runs, tests, held-out observation, or external code imports occurred.
